description: Tire tread depth below safe minimum or tread wear indicators are flush with surface
visual_signals: visible wear bars level with tread
bald spots on tire surface
tread depth visibly below 2/32 inch

description: Tire sidewall shows bulging, cracking, cuts, or exposed cord indicating structural failure risk
visual_signals: bulge protruding from sidewall
deep crack lines on tire side
fabric or cord visible through rubber

description: One or more required lights are broken, missing, or visibly non-functional on the vehicle
visual_signals: shattered light lens
missing bulb socket visible
condensation inside light housing

description: Windshield has cracks, chips, or shattering in the driver primary viewing area
visual_signals: spider crack pattern on windshield
chip with radiating fracture lines
long crack spanning windshield width

description: Side mirror is cracked, missing, or visibly misaligned reducing driver rearward visibility
visual_signals: broken mirror glass with fragments
empty mirror housing
mirror angled away from usable position

description: Fluid leak visible under or around the vehicle indicating engine, transmission, or hydraulic failure
visual_signals: dark puddle beneath engine area
wet streak along undercarriage
dripping fluid from hose or fitting

description: Body panel damage with sharp protruding edges creating laceration hazard for personnel
visual_signals: torn metal edge on fender or panel
protruding bent sheet metal
jagged edge from collision damage

description: Inspection sticker or registration decal is expired, missing, or illegible on the vehicle
visual_signals: expired date on inspection sticker
empty space where sticker should be
faded and unreadable decal

description: Load securement is inadequate with loose straps, missing tie-downs, or shifting cargo visible
visual_signals: slack strap flapping
cargo shifted to one side
broken ratchet on strap

description: Required reflective conspicuity tape or markings are missing, damaged, or insufficient on trailer
visual_signals: gaps in reflective tape along trailer side
peeling or faded conspicuity markings
missing rear reflective striping

description: Brake components visibly damaged, worn, or leaking with brake drum or rotor showing scoring or cracks
visual_signals: brake drum with visible crack or deep scoring
brake pad material worn to metal backing plate
brake fluid or grease leaking from wheel hub area

description: Air brake slack adjuster pushed beyond safe limit indicating brake adjustment out of specification
visual_signals: slack adjuster arm angle greater than 90 degrees from pushrod
pushrod stroke extended beyond adjustment mark
slack adjuster clevis pin missing or loose

description: Low air pressure warning system non-functional or air pressure gauge reading below safe operating range
visual_signals: air pressure gauge needle below 60 psi marking
low air warning buzzer light illuminated on dashboard
air pressure gauge with cracked lens or non-functional needle

description: Brake hose or air line shows cracking, chafing, bulging, or improper routing with contact against sharp edges
visual_signals: cracked or dry-rotted air brake hose at fitting
brake line chafed through outer cover from rubbing
bulging section on rubber brake hose indicating internal failure

description: Leaf spring cracked, broken, shifted, or missing leaves compromising vehicle suspension integrity
visual_signals: visibly cracked or broken leaf spring plate
leaf spring shifted sideways from spring seat
missing leaf from spring pack with visible gap

description: Air suspension bag deflated, torn, or leaking causing vehicle to ride unevenly or bottomed out
visual_signals: deflated or collapsed air bag on one side of axle
torn or cracked rubber air spring bag
vehicle listing to one side indicating air bag failure

description: Shock absorber leaking fluid, mounting hardware loose, or shock body damaged reducing ride control
visual_signals: oil film or wet streak on shock absorber body
shock absorber mounting bushing cracked or missing
dented or bent shock absorber cylinder

description: U-bolt on suspension spring pack loose, cracked, or missing allowing axle shift under load
visual_signals: visible gap between U-bolt nut and spring seat plate
cracked or stretched U-bolt with deformed threads
missing U-bolt with empty mounting holes on spring seat

description: Exhaust system component hanging, leaking near cab, or heat shield missing from catalytic converter
visual_signals: exhaust pipe hanging below normal position with broken hanger
soot staining on cab floor or firewall indicating exhaust leak
missing or displaced heat shield on catalytic converter

description: Fifth wheel coupling shows excessive wear, improper locking, cracked mounting, or missing locking jaw components
visual_signals: fifth wheel locking jaw not fully closed around kingpin
visible crack in fifth wheel mounting bracket or plate
excessive grease buildup with metal shavings indicating wear on fifth wheel surface

description: Kingpin on trailer shows wear, bending, or improper dimension compromising coupling security
visual_signals: visible wear groove around kingpin shank
kingpin appearing bent or off-center from trailer apron
metal filings or shavings accumulated around kingpin base

description: Safety chains missing, improperly attached, or showing excessive wear on towed equipment or converter dollies
visual_signals: missing safety chain on one or both sides of coupling
safety chain dragging on ground not crossed under tongue
worn or stretched chain links with visible thinning

description: Pintle hook worn, cracked, or latch mechanism not securing properly on combination vehicles
visual_signals: pintle hook latch not fully closed over drawbar eye
visible crack at base of pintle hook casting
worn or mushroomed pintle hook horn from repeated coupling

description: Frame rail showing cracks, severe corrosion, or bending that compromises structural integrity of vehicle chassis
visual_signals: visible crack in frame rail web or flange
heavy rust with flaking or perforation on frame member
bent or bowed frame rail visible from side profile

description: Cross-member damaged, missing fasteners, or showing corrosion weakening frame assembly
visual_signals: cross-member hanging or displaced from frame rails
missing bolts or rivets at cross-member to frame connection
heavy corrosion thinning cross-member material

description: Seat belt frayed, cut, buckle non-functional, or retractor mechanism failed in cab
visual_signals: frayed or cut webbing on driver seat belt
seat belt buckle that does not latch when pressed
seat belt fully extended and not retracting into housing

description: Fire extinguisher missing from cab, discharged, expired, or not properly mounted in required bracket
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket inside cab
extinguisher gauge needle in red discharge zone
fire extinguisher loose on cab floor without mounting bracket

description: Warning triangles or emergency reflectors missing or not properly stowed in required cab location
visual_signals: empty triangle storage bracket or container behind cab seat
broken or damaged warning triangle stored in cab
no emergency reflector kit visible in required cab storage area

description: Wiper blades torn, cracked, or missing and washer fluid reservoir empty compromising driver visibility
visual_signals: torn or split rubber on wiper blade edge
wiper blade arm with missing or detached blade
streaked or smeared windshield indicating worn wiper blades

description: Horn non-functional or horn housing damaged preventing required audible warning capability
visual_signals: dented or crushed horn housing visible behind bumper or grille
disconnected or cut wiring at horn assembly
horn grille or opening blocked by debris or damage

description: Fuel tank cap missing or not sealing, tank straps loose or corroded, or fuel line showing damage or leaks
visual_signals: missing or loose fuel tank cap with fuel odor staining
rusted or cracked fuel tank strap with visible thinning
wet fuel line fitting or drip stain below fuel system connection

description: Fuel tank cross-over pipe between dual tanks showing corrosion, loose clamps, or visible leak
visual_signals: corroded cross-over pipe between saddle fuel tanks
loose or missing hose clamp on fuel cross-over connection
fuel staining or wet area at cross-over pipe joint

description: Battery terminals corroded, hold-down bracket loose or missing, or battery case cracked leaking acid
visual_signals: white or green corrosion buildup on battery terminal posts
battery shifting in tray without hold-down clamp
cracked battery case with acid residue or wet staining on tray

description: Air brake compressor showing oil leaks, air dryer malfunctioning, or excessive moisture in air system
visual_signals: oil leak at air compressor mounting or discharge line
air dryer purge valve cycling excessively or not purging
water spray visible when draining air tank petcock

description: Glad hand connections damaged, improperly sealed, or trailer supply hose showing wear, cuts, or improper routing
visual_signals: cracked or chipped glad hand coupling seal face
air hose between tractor and trailer chafed against frame or cross-member
glad hand rubber seal missing or deformed causing audible air leak

description: USDOT number and company markings missing, illegible, or not meeting minimum size requirements on commercial vehicle
visual_signals: faded or peeling USDOT number decal on cab door
USDOT number characters smaller than required two-inch height
missing company name or motor carrier identification on vehicle door

description: Annual CVSA inspection decal expired, missing, or not displayed in proper location on vehicle
visual_signals: expired date visible on CVSA inspection decal
no CVSA inspection sticker present on left side of vehicle frame
damaged or illegible annual inspection decal

description: Hazmat placard incorrect for load, missing from required positions, or in damaged and illegible condition
visual_signals: empty placard holder on trailer side or rear carrying hazardous material
faded or weather-damaged hazmat placard with illegible class number
incorrect placard class displayed not matching vehicle cargo

description: Required emergency equipment missing including charged fire extinguisher, spare fuses, and first aid kit
visual_signals: no fire extinguisher visible in cab or required mounting location
empty first aid kit box or missing kit from cab
spare fuse container empty or missing from cab electrical panel area

description: Trailer body showing holes in walls or floor, damaged roof, or door latches and hinges that do not secure properly
visual_signals: hole or puncture visible in trailer side wall panel
trailer roof panel torn or lifted at seam exposing interior
door hinge pin missing or latch mechanism bent preventing secure closure

description: Refrigeration unit on trailer not operating, showing alarm condition, or fuel level critically low
visual_signals: reefer unit display showing alarm code or shutdown message
reefer fuel gauge indicating near-empty level
reefer unit not running with no compressor or fan noise indicators visible

description: Temperature recorder in refrigerated trailer not functioning, showing out-of-range reading, or missing printout capability
visual_signals: blank or non-functional temperature recorder display in reefer trailer
temperature recorder screen showing out-of-range alarm value
missing paper or non-printing temperature chart recorder

description: Mud flaps or splash guards missing, improperly mounted, torn, or dragging on road surface
visual_signals: missing mud flap bracket with no flap on rear axle
torn or shredded mud flap hanging from mounting hardware
mud flap dragging on ground with bottom edge worn through

description: Cab-over engine tilt mechanism not securing properly or tilt lock indicators showing unlocked position during travel
visual_signals: cab tilt safety latch in unlatched position
gap visible between cab and frame indicating cab not fully seated
cab tilt warning indicator illuminated on dashboard

description: ELD device not visible, not mounted correctly, or showing malfunction indicators in cab of commercial vehicle
visual_signals: no electronic logging device visible on dashboard or windshield mount
ELD screen showing diagnostic or malfunction error code
ELD device dangling from loose windshield mount or disconnected cable
